title: Cloudflare beats earnings estimates with strong revenue and customer growth
text: Cloudflare's large customer count grew approximately 29.5% year-over-year to 3,046 by Q2 2024. Large customers—those spending $100,000 or more in annual recurring revenue—were up 22% to 3,712 as of Q2 2025. At least 173 Cloudflare customers generated over $1 million in annual spend as of late 2024. Record growth was seen in the largest customers, those spending over $1 million annually, with 55 added in 2024 and more than half of the new adds in the fourth quarter alone. Enterprise plans are sold exclusively through direct sales with every contract custom-negotiated based on traffic volume, security stack, support tier, zone count, and contract length. Enterprise contracts start closer to $5,000/month, with most organizations finding themselves in the mid-market band once Bot Management and advanced WAF rulesets are attached. In Q4 2024, nearly 80% of Cloudflare's new sales hires were in the enterprise segment and the absolute number of new enterprise account executives hired increased 84% year over year.
